title: UserGroup
description: An IAM user group that organizes users and assigns roles and service group access.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the user group.

name.description: The name of the user group.

description.description: A description of the user group.

users_count.description: The number of users in the group.

roles_count.description: The number of roles assigned to the group.

service_groups_count.description: The number of service groups associated with the user group.

created_at.description: The date and time the user group was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the user group was last updated.
